rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
generic_rules: AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Use exact names from the AADL model index for all identifiers in AGREE annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Assumptions and guarantees are declared with `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;`
Constants and equations are declared with `const name : type = value;` and `eq name : type = expression;`
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens (ms/us/Hz/Bytes) as AGREE variables
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent new ports/components not present in the AADL model
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and component implementation details
